content.text:
[cron:d8-sentiment-analyzer-4h d8-sentiment-analyzer] D8 SENTIMENT SCAN: Analyze community posts and DMs from last 4 hours across SaaS instances. Flag negative sentiment (complaints, frustration, churn signals). For critical issues, send urgent alert. Return blank if no negative sentiment detected.
Current time: Saturday, March 21st, 2026 — 18:37 (America/Chicago) / 2026-03-21 23:37 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
